description: MCP server for the Auvik network monitoring API — devices, alerts, statistics, billing.
name: io.github.wyre-technology/auvik-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Auvik username (email) used as HTTP Basic auth user
environmentVariables.name: AUVIK_USERNAME

environmentVariables.description: Auvik API key (generated in the Auvik portal under Integrations -> APIs)
environmentVariables.name: AUVIK_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Auvik regional API host (us1, us2, us3, us4, eu1, eu2, au1, ca1). Omit to auto-detect via /authentication/verify probe.
environmentVariables.name: AUVIK_REGION

environmentVariables.description: Transport mode for the server. Set to 'stdio' for local CLI use; the image defaults to 'http' for gateway hosting.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_TRANSPORT

environmentVariables.description: Credential source: 'env' reads vars locally, 'gateway' expects header injection from the WYRE MCP Gateway.
environmentVariables.name: AUTH_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Log verbosity: debug, info, warn, error
environmentVariables.name: LOG_LEVEL

title: Auvik
